channel.title: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX — Cyber Threat Intelligence
channel.description: Real-time cybersecurity threat intelligence: CVE analysis, zero-day exploits, ransomware tracking, APT campaigns, IOCs, YARA rules & enterprise defense strategies.
channel.generator: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX RSS Engine v3.0

image.title: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX — Cyber Threat Intelligence

item.title: AI Security Report: Prompt Injection & Agentic AI Attack Surface 2026
item.description: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX AI Security Report: Prompt Injection attacks remain OWASP LLM #1 vulnerability in 2026. 73% of enterprise AI deployments vulnerable. Autonomous AI agents dramatically expand attack surface. Full technical breakdown, MITRE mapping, and enterprise defensive playbook.
item.content:encoded:
CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX AI Security Report: Prompt Injection attacks remain OWASP LLM #1 vulnerability in 2026. 73% of enterprise AI deployments vulnerable. Autonomous AI agents dramatically expand attack surface. Full technical breakdown, MITRE mapping, and enterprise defensive playbook.

🔗 Read Full Intel Report →

item.title: April 2026 Ransomware Round-Up: Qilin, Akira, LockBit 4.0 & Black Basta
item.description: April 2026 Ransomware Round-Up: Qilin, Akira, LockBit 4.0, and Black Basta active campaigns. Healthcare, financial services, and critical infrastructure targeted. Full IOC tables, YARA rules, and enterprise defense playbook.
item.content:encoded:
April 2026 Ransomware Round-Up: Qilin, Akira, LockBit 4.0, and Black Basta active campaigns. Healthcare, financial services, and critical infrastructure targeted. Full IOC tables, YARA rules, and enterprise defense playbook.

item.title: CVE-2026-28401: Ivanti Connect Secure Zero-Day — Supply Chain RCE Targeting Fortune 500
item.description: Critical analysis of CVE-2026-28401, an Ivanti Connect Secure pre-auth RCE zero-day exploited in a global supply chain attack. CVSS 10.0. CISA emergency directive. IOCs, YARA, SIEM queries, and enterprise remediation.
item.content:encoded:
Critical analysis of CVE-2026-28401, an Ivanti Connect Secure pre-auth RCE zero-day exploited in a global supply chain attack. CVSS 10.0. CISA emergency directive. IOCs, YARA, SIEM queries, and enterprise remediation.

🔗 Read Full Intel Report →

item.title: CVE-2026-32201 SharePoint Zero-Day + April 2026 Patch Tuesday Analysis
item.description: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-32201 Microsoft SharePoint Spoofing Zero-Day (CVSS 6.5) actively exploited, CISA KEV listed. Full April 2026 Patch Tuesday analysis — 163 CVEs, 8 critical, 2 zero-days. Federal deadline April 28, 2026.
item.content:encoded:
CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-32201 Microsoft SharePoint Spoofing Zero-Day (CVSS 6.5) actively exploited, CISA KEV listed. Full April 2026 Patch Tuesday analysis — 163 CVEs, 8 critical, 2 zero-days. Federal deadline April 28, 2026.

🔗 Read Full Intel Report →

item.title: CVE-2026-33824 — Windows IKE Service Unauthenticated RCE (CVSS 9.8)
item.description: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX CRITICAL: CVE-2026-33824 — Windows IKE Service CWE-415 double-free RCE (CVSS 9.8). Unauthenticated, network-based attack via UDP 500/4500. All internet-exposed VPN gateways at risk. Full technical analysis, IOCs, YARA, SIEM queries.
item.content:encoded:
CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX CRITICAL: CVE-2026-33824 — Windows IKE Service CWE-415 double-free RCE (CVSS 9.8). Unauthenticated, network-based attack via UDP 500/4500. All internet-exposed VPN gateways at risk. Full technical analysis, IOCs, YARA, SIEM queries.

🔗 Read Full Intel Report →

item.title: CRITICAL: Three Microsoft Defender Zero-Days Actively Exploited | CVE-2026-33825
item.description: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX CRITICAL ALERT: Three Microsoft Defender zero-days (CVE-2026-33825, BlueHammer, RedSun) actively exploited in the wild. Full technical breakdown, MITRE ATT&CK mapping, IOCs, and defensive playbook for SOC teams.
item.content:encoded:

item.title: CRITICAL: CVE-2026-35616 — Fortinet FortiClient EMS Zero-Day (CVSS 9.8)
item.description: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX ALERT: CVE-2026-35616 — Fortinet FortiClient EMS pre-authentication API bypass (CVSS 9.8) actively exploited. CISA KEV listed. Full technical breakdown, IOCs, and defensive playbook.
item.content:encoded:

item.title: CVE-2026-5281 — Chrome Zero-Day: Use-After-Free in Dawn WebGPU
item.description: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-5281 Google Chrome Zero-Day — Use-After-Free in Dawn WebGPU implementation. Renderer process escape via crafted HTML. CISA KEV listed, federal deadline April 15. Affects all Chromium-based browsers. Full technical analysis, IOCs, YARA, SIEM.
item.content:encoded:
CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-5281 Google Chrome Zero-Day — Use-After-Free in Dawn WebGPU implementation. Renderer process escape via crafted HTML. CISA KEV listed, federal deadline April 15. Affects all Chromium-based browsers. Full technical analysis, IOCs, YARA, SIEM.

🔗 Read Full Intel Report →

item.title: Volt Typhoon 2026: ICS/SCADA Critical Infrastructure Attack — Power Grid & Water Systems at Risk
item.description: CISA/FBI joint advisory on Volt Typhoon 2026 campaign targeting US and allied critical infrastructure ICS/SCADA systems. Power grids, water treatment, and transportation networks compromised. Full TTPs, IOCs, YARA, detection queries.
item.content:encoded:
CISA/FBI joint advisory on Volt Typhoon 2026 campaign targeting US and allied critical infrastructure ICS/SCADA systems. Power grids, water treatment, and transportation networks compromised. Full TTPs, IOCs, YARA, detection queries.

🔗 Read Full Intel Report →

item.title: CVE-2026-21497: VMware ESXi Hypervisor Escape — Guest-to-Host RCE
item.description: CVE-2026-21497: Critical VMware ESXi hypervisor escape vulnerability. Guest VM to host RCE via VMXNET3 heap overflow. Actively exploited by ransomware groups. Full kill chain, IOCs, YARA, and SIEM queries.
item.content:encoded:
CVE-2026-21497: Critical VMware ESXi hypervisor escape vulnerability. Guest VM to host RCE via VMXNET3 heap overflow. Actively exploited by ransomware groups. Full kill chain, IOCs, YARA, and SIEM queries.

🔗 Read Full Intel Report →
